headline: Epstein Island PICS 💦🏝️ DROP 🐸 – Masks, Beds & Ghislaine's Speed-Dial SLAY 👻📱
text:
🚨 DEMS on House Oversight 💥🔍 just YEETED 🐸 never-before-seen PICS 📸💦 and VID 🎥 of JEFFREY EPSTEIN'S 😈 PEDO PARADISE Little St James 🏝️🍆 – those THICC bedrooms 🛏️😩, WALL of KINKY MASKS 😷👹, and a PHONE 📞 with SPEED-DIAL NAMES scribbled like a LOLITA LOL LIST 😂🍑! Robert Garcia 🕵️‍♂️💅 spilling the TEA ☕: 'DISTURBING PEEP 👀 into Epstein's WICKED WORLD 🌍😱 – dropping for TRANSPARENCY 🔓 so we PIECE TOGETHER his HORRIFIC CRIMES 🩸🔪!' Survivors SPILLING 👄 that they got TRAFFICKED 🚛💃 and ABUSED 😢🍆 on this VIRGIN ISLAND VICE DEN 🏝️🚫 – DENTAL CHAIR 🦷😬 for 'check-ups' and CHALKBOARD 🖥️ with 'TRUTH' ✍️ 'DECEPTION' 🤥 'POLITICAL' 🏛️ scribbles (some REDACTED 🖍️🔒 like Clinton's flight logs ✈️👀)!

Trump 🍊👑 signed that BOMB BILL 💣📜 on Nov 19 📅 – 30-DAY COUNTDOWN ⏰ to DEC 19 for FULL EPSTEIN FILES 🗂️🔥 from DOJ, but Pam Bondi ⚖️💋 can REDACT victim deets 🛡️ or HOLD for 'ACTIVE PROBES' 🕵️‍♀️🚨 – Trump YEETING shade at BILL CLINTON 🕶️🍆 and LARRY SUMMERS 💼🤝 Epstein BROS: 'What was REALLY going down? 🤔💥' Ghislaine MAXWELL 🔒🍑 still ROTTING in JAIL 🏰 for co-conspirator SLAY, after $105M SETTLEMENT 💰🤑 from USVI AG for DOZENS of YOUNG GIRLS trafficked, RAPED & ASSAULTED 😭🚨 on Epstein's TWO ISLAND EMPIRE 🏝️🏝️!

Dems PRESSED 🔴 on Trump admin: 'RELEASE ALL FILES NOW ‼️📂 – no more HIDING!' Got JP MORGAN 🏦 and DEUTSCHE BANK 📊 records DROPPING SOON 🛐 – this is the GLIMPSE 👁️ into Epstein's OPULENT ORGY LIFESTYLE 💦🏰, but the BIG LIST of CELEB CUCKS 🐔👑 like who speed-dialed the PEDO KING? 😈📞 WSJ vibes but WILDER 📰🔥! Survivors SIMPING for JUSTICE ⚖️😤, Dems FIGHTING 🥊 till FULL PICTURE 📷 – Epstein's ghost HAUNTING DC 👻🏛️ with every MASK & BED PIC! No new tea on the CASE 🕵️‍♂️ but OPULENT CRIME SCENE VIEWS 🍆🩸 got X TWITTERING 🐦💨 – Trump-MBS energy but for EPSTEIN EXPOSE 🚀📢! Pam Bondi HOLD MY FILES 🗂️😏 while Garcia RAGES: 'WE WON'T STOP TILL JUSTICE CUMS 💦⚖️!'
